gbp_search: Moonstone Pressure Washing Lithia Springs GA

business_context.owner: Alonzo Lara Cabrera Sr. (father) and Alonso Jr. (son)
business_context.location: Lithia Springs, GA (service-area, based at 1044 Moonstone Court)
business_context.specialties: Soft washing (house, roof, fencing), pressure washing (driveways, patios, sidewalks), paver sealing, gutter cleaning, commercial washing. AMRA-compliant roof cleaning.
business_context.photo_notes: Pressure washing is THE most photo-dependent trade — the before/after transformation is the entire sales pitch. Their Instagram @moonstonepressurewashingllc has 40+ work photos. Website embeds these. GBP specifically is unknown but research suggests they document work heavily.

photo_count_from_gbp_estimate: unknown — could be 10-40+. Instagram has 40+, but GBP may be smaller subset

hero.search_for: Father-and-son team in action pressure washing a house or driveway, OR a dramatic before/after driveway shot with the dirty/clean split visible. Prefer real Alonzo/Alonso photo over stock. Current hero is their branded truck image (usable fallback).
hero.aspect_hint: wide landscape, will be full-viewport background with gradient overlay

gallery.search_for: Before/after transformations: house washing, driveway cleaning, roof cleaning, deck cleaning, paver sealing. Ideally paired before/after shots. If only separate photos exist, prioritize the most dramatic clean-up shots (mildew removal, algae-to-clean, black-streaked roof to clean).
gallery.aspect_hint: 4:3 or 3:2 landscape preferred for grid display

naming.hero: hero.jpg (already exists with truck image — REPLACE if better GBP option available, KEEP if not)

fallback_if_unavailable.hero: Keep existing hero.jpg (branded truck from their website). It's authentic to the business.
fallback_if_unavailable.gallery: If GBP has fewer than 6 usable photos, check Instagram @moonstonepressurewashingllc next (Bruce has broader tool access). If still under 6, deliver 3-5 and note in delivery message. Do NOT use stock pressure washing photos.

acceptance_criteria: Hero shows either the family team or a dramatic before/after driveway transformation
Gallery shows real Moonstone work (recognizable property contexts, not staged stock)
No AI-generated or stock pressure washing photos
Before/after pairs are ideal where available
